settings.html:
<style>
    
    /* Initial header state */
#site-header {
    transition: all 0.3s ease; /* Smooth animation */
    background-color: transparent;
    border-radius: 0;
    box-shadow: none;
}

/* Header styles on scroll */
#site-header.scrolled {
    background-color: #FEFEFE;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}
    
</style>

<script>
    
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // Select all headers with the class 'site-header'
    const headers = document.querySelectorAll(".site-header");

    // Add a scroll event listener to the window
    window.addEventListener("scroll", function () {
        headers.forEach(header => {
            if (window.scrollY > 0) {
                header.classList.add("scrolled"); // Add 'scrolled' class when scrolling down
            } else {
                header.classList.remove("scrolled"); // Remove 'scrolled' class when at the top
            }
        });
    });
});

    
</script>

settings.html:
<style>

.content {
  overflow: hidden;
  max-height: 512px; /* Initial height to show part of the content */
  transition: max-height 0.8s ease; /* Smooth transition for height change */
  position: relative; /* For positioning the gradient overlay */
}

.content::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 256px; /* Height of the gradient overlay */
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 0%, #f4f4f4 100%);
  pointer-events: none; /* Allow interaction with content despite the overlay */
}

.content.expanded {
  max-height: none; /* Allow content to expand fully */
}

.toggle-btn {
  cursor: pointer !important;
}

</style>

<script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  // Select the button and content
  const button = document.querySelector('.toggle-btn');
  const content = document.querySelector('.content');

  // Add a click event listener to the button
  button.addEventListener('click', function () {
    // Add the 'expanded' class to the content to reveal it fully
    content.classList.add('expanded');
    
    // Hide the button
    button.style.display = 'none';
  });
});
    
</script>
